action_text: Click the "Reports" application in the left navigation results to expand it
rationale: We need to open the Reports application to access its modules, including View/Run.

action_text: Click the expand/collapse arrow next to "Reports"
rationale: If the disclosure arrow is required, clicking it will expand the Reports module list.

action_text: Type "View / Run" into the left navigation filter
rationale: Directly filtering for the target module name should surface the "View / Run" entry for quick access.

action_text: Type "View/Run" into the left navigation filter
rationale: Some instances list the module without spaces around the slash; this variant may match it.

action_text: Type "View" into the left navigation filter
rationale: If exact matching fails, a broader filter will list modules beginning with "View", including "View / Run".
